test: negation can be formulated without using the concept — strong postulate, not axiom

principles.name: Territorio parcialmente independiente del mapa
principles.description: Territory is partially independent of the map

principles.name: Fidelidad parcial mas peligrosa que cero
principles.description: Partial fidelity is more dangerous than zero

principles.name: Sin correccion explicita la distorsion se acumula
principles.description: Without explicit correction, distortion accumulates by default

principles.name: El navegante ES el mapa
principles.description: The navigator IS the map — not: the navigator HAS a map

principles.name: Otras perspectivas existen
principles.description: Other perspectives exist. Basis: past self was real and unmodifiable; a projection can be modified, the past cannot.
